system.description:
You have created a medium-sized mechanical companion. It moves for free on your turn and has 5 HP/LVL.

Powered Actions. Your robot can only attack or use special abilities by spending your Mana Dice.

Modularity. Your companion has 2 module slots that can hold one of your major inventions or a companion module. Immediately choose 1 invention to insert into your companion.

You can reconfigure your companion with different available modules during a Safe Rest.

Mishap — Misfire. Your companion makes a free attack against a random creature within range (friend or foe).

Repair Kit. (INT/Safe Rest) Action: Roll all your Mana Dice without expending them and heal your companion for the sum rolled + INT.

Companion Modules

  • Heavy Chassis. Your companion's size becomes Large. Spend Mana Dice to Stomp! the ground — creatures within 1 space take damage equal to the sum. On crit: Prone. Mishap — Loose Bolt: Cannot move for 1 turn. Upgrades: Telescopic Arms (+1 Reach), Steel Bulwark (provide cover for smaller allies).
  • Rocket Engines. Spend a Mana Die to fly up to your speed until the start of your next turn. Mishap — Crash Landing: Roll as many Mana Dice as you spent and take that much damage. Upgrade: Boosters (carry a passenger while flying).
  • Electrified Chassis. When you get hit, spend Mana Dice to deal that much damage to the attacker. Mishap — Short Circuit: Take the same damage. Upgrades: Armored Carapace (gain Medium armor), Structural Reinforcement (+2 HP/LVL).

Hero Companion Basics. Companions move for free on your turn and have a Companion Die (dC). They can Attack (1dC melee, +LVL on crit) or Defend (reduce incoming damage by 1dC). The dC is used up when rolled and recovered at end of turn. At 0 HP they gain a Wound and flee until calmed; 4 Wounds = death; recovers a Wound on Safe Rest. During a Field Rest, the companion may recover HP equal to the PC's KEY score.
